case_title: JENNIFER CAROLINE MACNEIL VS. RED HOT RESTAURANT INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACNEIL, JENNIFER CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT RED HOT RESTAURANT INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA RESTAURANT MAROC AND DBA BAMBUDDHA LOUNGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACNEIL, JENNIFER CAROLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RED HOT RESTAURANT INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA RESTAURANT MAROC AND DBA BAMBUDDHA LOUNGE $12,860.15 PRINCIPAL, $133.01 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,173.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
